thesis: Translate discretionary long intraday motifs from BSL / day-2 breakout / gap reversal notes into systematic large-cap and ETF families, while retaining validated daily controls.

benchmark.purpose: Primary passive benchmark across daily and intraday pilot batches

universe.name: intraday_large_cap_liquid_v1
universe.selection_rule: Liquid large-cap names and broad ETFs with minute Polygon data and existing daily baselines

candidates.hypothesis: Primary campaign benchmark remains VOO buy-and-hold.

Carry forward the deployable leveraged daily control into the intraday pilot window.
